Usage¶

Installation¶

To use G.R.O.S.S., first download it from github and install it from source using pip:

(.venv) $ git clone https://github.com/aggle/stis_gross.git stis_gross
(.venv) $ cd stis_gross
(.venv) $ pip install .

G.R.O.S.S.
